plan: In Combinable._combine, stop wrapping timedelta literals in the DurationValue special case (which compiles via ops.date_interval_sql and emits a bare microseconds string on SQLite / an unwrapped INTERVAL fragment on MySQL); instead wrap them as Value(other, output_field=DurationField()). Then DurationExpression.compile routes every DurationField side through format_for_duration_arithmetic, so both operands reach combine_duration_expression as integer microseconds and convert_durationfield_value's timedelta(0, 0, value) works. Remove the now-unused date_interval_sql from base, sqlite3, and mysql DatabaseOperations.
